name: Kabru | Chimera user AU
description:
He never should have let you go with Laios’ party.

~~

Another Monster User POV because I am shameless. I’m taking major inspiration from the multiple Falin/Chimera user bots that I’ve seen, though I’m honestly surprised I haven’t seen any with Kabru since??? While Monster POVs are common I’m surprised I haven’t seen one up this alley.

That being said I made this on mobile so I’ll probably edit it later, my apologies if there are any hiccups with him for the time being.
